activation.title: License Activation
activation.ready_champion: All set, {{name}}! Your account is linked. Now, activate your tech license to unlock the dashboard.
activation.secure_processing: Secure processing via Super Checkout Central
activation.benefit_license_detail: No monthly fees on the base version

upgrade_domains.name: Unlimited Domains Plan
upgrade_domains.description: Remove all domain limits and get lifetime access to the Super Checkout ecosystem.

whitelabel.name: Unlimited Domains Plan
whitelabel.description: Remove all domain limits and get lifetime access to the Super Checkout ecosystem.

saas.name: Partner Plan
saas.description: Turn your Super Checkout into a sales machine and manage unlimited clients.

welcome.title: WELCOME TO THE
welcome.desc: Configure your license, manage installations and access the Super Checkout ecosystem in a high-performance premium environment.

basic_dashboard.title: Essential operations panel
basic_dashboard.description: See your installation key, track the current system status and open the main shortcuts without exposing any partner layer.
basic_dashboard.empty_key: Your free license has not been generated yet. Use the access data tab to unlock your key now.
basic_dashboard.empty_link: No secure link has been generated in this session yet. Generate a temporary link whenever you want to install or reinstall.

status.active_desc: Your environment is published and responding on {{domain}}.
status.inactive_desc: There is installation history, but no active instance was found right now.
status.pending_desc: Your account is ready to generate the first installation link.

basic_dashboard.limited_desc: Your current plan runs with 1 domain and 3 products. When you are ready to scale without limits, upgrade to the unlimited plan.
basic_dashboard.unlimited_desc: Your current plan already runs with unlocked limits for growth and new installations.

quick_access.title: Fast access to your system
quick_access.ready: Your active installation can already open the main modules directly on the published domain.
quick_access.waiting: As soon as there is an active installation, these shortcuts will open the published customer panel automatically.

install.title: Infrastructure & Deploy
install.operating_at: Your system is operating successfully at:
install.new_server_warn: New Server? When reinstalling, the current system will be disconnected to make room for the new deploy.
install.deploy_desc: Generate a secure and temporary token to start the automated installation wizard.
install.reinstall_confirm: This action will disconnect the checkout at {{domain}}. Continue?
install.limit_nudge: You have reached the limit of 1 domain. Unlock unlimited domains now.

tutorials.title: Tutorials
tutorials.no_tutorials: No tutorials found for your plan.
tutorials.master_feature: Master this feature with our detailed guide.

security.title: Account Security
security.password_min_length: Password must be at least 6 characters long.
security.password_set_desc: Now you can access using your email and password.
security.security_advice: We recommend setting a password to make your next logins easier without depending on Magic Links.

profile.security_desc: Protect your access or change your login password.

opportunity.hero_title: TRANSFORM TECHNOLOGY INTO PROFIT
opportunity.hero_desc: Learn the system installation process and sell this service to clients you refer.
opportunity.hero_desc_extra: You install. You charge. 100% of the value is yours.
opportunity.immediate_access: Immediate access to training + infrastructure released
opportunity.service_tool: The system is the tool. Installation is the service you sell.
opportunity.learn_desc: Access the complete step-by-step guide to configure the system for new clients professionally.
opportunity.charge_desc: Charge between $ 50 to $ 97 per setup. No commission. No hidden fees. 100% yours.
opportunity.roi_desc: The investment pays off quickly. After that, every new client is direct profit in your account.
opportunity.no_fees: WE DON'T CHARGE FEES ON YOUR SERVICES

for_whom_items.income: Wants to generate income by providing digital service
for_whom_items.tech: Already works with marketing, traffic or technology
for_whom_items.ready: Wants to sell a ready-made solution without creating a product from scratch
for_whom_items.scale: Wants to scale by serving multiple clients

opportunity.ready_to_sell:
READY TO SELL
INSTALLATIONS AND PROFIT?
opportunity.no_need_create: You don't need to create a system. You just need to install and charge for it.

partner.hub_desc: Manage your leads, provide technical support and track your installations in real-time.
partner.viral_use: Use this link to viralize content and capture new technical leads.
partner.promote_link: Promote your link to start capturing.
partner.whatsapp_invalid: This lead did not provide a valid WhatsApp number.
partner.whatsapp_message: Hi {{name}}, I saw you registered at Super Checkout and I'm here to help you with the 1-click technical setup. What's the best time to talk?
partner.policy_desc: Your access as a partner depends on maintaining the quality of installations. Misuse of master infrastructure for unauthorized projects will result in immediate revocation.

simulator.title: Earnings Simulator
simulator.description: Simulate your potential profits by promoting the ecosystem and performing installation and configuration services.
simulator.legal_disclaimer: This is a simulation based on projections. Actual results depend exclusively on your effort, traffic strategy and market of operation. We do not guarantee fixed financial gains.
